---
title: "RePast: Strengthening European integration through the Analysis of Conflict Discourses. Revisiting the Past, Anticipating the Future (G.A. no. 769252)"
date: "2018"
year: "2018-2021"
funder: "Horizon 2020, CULT-COOP-02-2017, European Commission"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
---

RePast: Strengthening European integration through the Analysis of Conflict Discourses. Revisiting the Past, Anticipating the Future (G.A. no. 769252)
